description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a spacious fenced yard featuring a large green lawn and a freeform swimming pool. The structure is predominantly white with large windows, multiple outdoor patios, and a visible garage area. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch and landscaped greenery, while the backyard includes a row of lounge chairs and a shaded patio area. The property is bordered by a white fence and includes several trees and shrubs for added privacy and aesthetic appeal. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the main facade, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open sightlines, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious yard featuring a pool, patios, and landscaped greenery. The property is enclosed by a white fence and includes a garage and multiple outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the pool, and the row of lounge chairs in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upper story setback, side yard, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
